owasp_risk: AAI006 — Agent Memory and Context Manipulation
narrative: An attacker tampers with the result field of a signed receipt after the fact, attempting to silently rewrite an audit trail (e.g., a poisoned-RAG retrieval claiming benign content). APS verifyReceipt detects post-sign tampering: any byte change to the signed payload invalidates the Ed25519 signature.

expected_outcome.verifier_assertion: verifyReceipt must return { valid: false } when the result field is mutated after signing
